title: hpke: single_shot_seal is non-deterministic by construction; no nonce reuse risk
description: hpke.rs uses X25519HkdfSha256 HPKE with single_shot_seal. HPKE generates a fresh ephemeral X25519 keypair per seal call (confirmed by seal_is_not_deterministic test). There is no shared nonce state. The INFO binding nie/sealed/v1 is correct context-binding, not a nonce. A future contributor might suggest adding a counter or random salt for belt-and-suspenders, but this would add complexity with no security benefit -- HPKE's security against nonce reuse does not apply here since each encapsulation is independent. Do not change this.
